ddls:
CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death (e.g., Diseases of heart) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause of death */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause of death (e.g., Injuries, Poisonings) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the cause of death (e.g., Unintentional injuries, Suicides) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic factor */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic factor (e.g., Black, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic factor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic factor (e.g., Ethnicity, Sex) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the demographic factor (e.g., African American, Asian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the mortality data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality rate */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic factor */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths for the given cause, demographic factor, and year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population for the given demographic factor and year */,
  "crude_rate" TEXT /* Crude mortality rate for the given cause, demographic factor, and year */,
  "age_adjusted_rate" TEXT /* Age-adjusted mortality rate for the given cause, demographic factor, and year */,
  "rank_order" INTEGER /* Rank order of the cause of death for the given demographic factor and year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mortality data */,
  "mortality_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality rate being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mortality data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the mortality data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mortality_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_rate_id") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view_data, download_data, manage_users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution (e.g., Harvard University, CDC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Epidemiology, Mortality Statistics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the department belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_institutions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department_id")
)
